items.title: Fleet uptime risk review
items.name: Fleet uptime risk review
items.summary: Discovery work tracks which field, network, and maintenance patterns most threaten uptime as deployments scale.
items.opportunity: Prevent reliability issues from eroding municipal trust during expansion.

linkedInitiatives.description: Installed-base Reliability Guardrail exists to keep field uptime and municipal trust strong while the platform footprint expands.

plannedActivities: Review low-battery, low-signal, and repeated-maintenance patterns across active sites.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which reliability issues require product fixes versus operating-process changes.
